query: SELECT bp.id, bp.title, bp.department, bp.salaryAmount, bp.classificationType, be.name as entityName FROM business_positions bp JOIN business_entities be ON bp.businessEntityId = be.id ORDER BY bp.salaryAmount DESC;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user nC6sHo9eqXDn4Lp.root --database SPWUc63a3tjYuzCxiuEomB --execute SELECT bp.id, bp.title, bp.department, bp.salaryAmount, bp.classificationType, be.name as entityName FROM business_positions bp JOIN business_entities be ON bp.businessEntityId = be.id ORDER BY bp.salaryAmount DESC;
